title: dactylorchis majalis var. brevicalcarata
intro: Dactylorchis majalis var. brevicalcarata, also known as the Spiranthes brevicalcarata, is a rare orchid species found in various parts of the world, particularly in mountainous regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
